---
title: "Talks"
---

::: {.talks-list}

::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-abbr}
Chapel Hill
:::
::: {.talk-body}
::: {.talk-title}
14th International Conference on Extreme Value Analysis (EVA) – University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill, USA
:::

::: {.talk-date}
Jun 2025
:::

::: {.talk-links}
[Website](https://eva2025.unc.edu/){.talk-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
[Slides](slides/scheffel_eva_2025.pdf){.talk-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-abbr}
Dresden
:::
::: {.talk-body}
::: {.talk-title}
17th German Probability and Statistics Days (GPSD) – Technische Universität Dresden, Germany
:::

::: {.talk-date}
Mar 2025
:::

::: {.talk-links}
[Slides](slides/scheffel_gpsd_2025.pdf){.talk-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-abbr}
Tokyo
:::
::: {.talk-body}
::: {.talk-title}
ECOSTA – online
:::

::: {.talk-date}
Aug 2025
:::

::: {.talk-links}
[Website](https://www.cmstatistics.org/EcoSta2025/index.php){.talk-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
[Slides](slides/scheffel_ecosta_2025.pdf){.talk-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-abbr}
Bochum
:::
::: {.talk-body}
::: {.talk-title}
SPP 2265 Workshop: Geometric extreme value theory – Bochum, Germany
:::

::: {.talk-date}
Oct 2024
:::

::: {.talk-links}
[Website](https://sites.google.com/view/geometric-extremes-bochum/home){.talk-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
[Slides](slides/scheffel_geometric_extremes_2024.pdf){.talk-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-abbr}
Berlin
:::
::: {.talk-body}
::: {.talk-title}
CMStatistics – Berlin, Germany
:::

::: {.talk-date}
Dec 2023
:::

::: {.talk-links}
[Website](https://www.cmstatistics.org/CMStatistics2023/index.php){.talk-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
[Slides](slides/scheffel_cmstatistics_2023.pdf){.talk-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::
:::
:::

:::
